name: Cydney mcmillon
ai_summary: Cydney Mcmillon is a technology teacher with five years of experience working with K-8 students and a passion for making learning fun. She is located in Tempe, AZ and available for both full-time and part-time positions, with a strong focus on creating supportive environments where children can thrive.

transcripts.q3:
Hi, my name is Sydney, and I am a technology teacher, who have, who has about five years of experience? In the classroom, I have worked with grades K through 8. In all different subjects, being an elective teacher has been my primary subject to teach but I love working with kids. I love making learning fun and just I have a passion for
 Or teaching the younger generation and it's just something that I've always been very excited about.
transcripts.q4: Hi. I am located in Tempe, Arizona, but I am willing to travel up to 25 miles an hour.
transcripts.q5: I am available for both part-time and full-time work. I am available as soon as possible my schedule. I can be I can start my shift anywhere from 7 to 7 a.m. to 7 p.m.
transcripts.q6:
Because I've worked in the classroom with kids as small as five years old. Of course I have experience with dealing with conflict. If I if one kid hits another kid in the class, the first thing that I want to do is talk to both of them. Get the story. You know, kids can sometimes exaggerate or, or may not have everything correct in their story. But I like to hear both sides and I like
 to, you know, make them apologize to each other. After I have investigated the source of the conflict and then like to separate them and depending on how, you know, severe the injury is, I may get a ministration or parents involved.
transcripts.q7: I will make a great up kid teacher because I am a caring Dependable, professional with the background and education coaching and Leadership. I excel in creating an environment where children can Thrive and learn and I where I can support, children's developmental needs and cater to each individual's learning abilities
